Submission received

You are on the editor list

Your profile is in the review queue. We will use your portfolio, editing fit, availability, and source details to understand where you fit best.

Review your profile See portfolio examples

Next

What happens now

  1. Keep your portfolio link current and easy to scan.
  2. Reply quickly if we reach out about a matching brief.
  3. Share the editor list with editors who would make this community stronger.

Share

Help the early list get stronger

Invite another editor Send the editor intake to a peer whose portfolio should be in the early list. Send to a hiring team Know someone hiring editors? Route them to the brief form instead of a vague post. Share the jobs guide A practical guide editors can use even before the job board has public listings. Share portfolio examples Useful for editors who need to show matched proof instead of sending a generic reel.
